Very slowly pour the contents of the blender over the strawberry mixture in the glasses. If you like, garnish each glass with a pineapple wedge. Enjoy!

similar.name: Lava Flows Pina Coladas With Rivers of Strawberry

name: Plum Agua Fresca
directions: Squeeze plum pulp from skin and pit and puree.
Stir plum puree with the remaining ingredients and chill.

name: Citrus Brandied Cocktail Cherries
directions: Using a vegetable peeler, remove orange peel in wide strips, making sure to avoid the white pith.

Place peels, sugar, water, allspice and nutmeg in a small saucepan over medium heat, stirring occasionally until the mixture comes to a boil. Remove from heat and let cool to room temp, about 45 minutes.
Place a fine mesh strainer over a container with a spout and strain the syrup. Reserve the orange peels and discard the remaining solids. Add Brandy to the syrup and stir to combine.

Place cherries in a 1-quart container with a tight fitting lid, threading the orange peels throughout the cherries. Pour the brandy syrup over the cherries, cover and refridgerate for at least 5 days before serving. Store in fridge for up to 3 weeks.

similar.name: Sally's Special Apricot Brandy Whiskey Sours

name: Champagne Pomegranate Cosmo
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker halfway with ice.
Add all ingredients and shake vigorously.
Pour into a martini glass and garnish with a slice of lime.

name: Amar Al Din, [ramadan Apricot Juice]
directions: Cut up the apricot sheets into 4 or 5 stips.
Add water to cover.
Soak until apricot dissolves. (5 hours).
Once apricot is fully dissolved, refrigerate.
Serve cold.

name: Peach Cordial
directions: In a gallon glass mayonnaise jar, or other type of crock that can be sealed completely, mix all the ingredients and seal with electrical or duct tape so no aid can get in or liquid can evaporate.  Shake gently twice a day until the sugar is dissolved (generally takes 2-3 days) then about every other day so that the mixture is evenly flavored.  Now the hard part -- Let sit, for 2 months.  Then strain through 4 layers of cheesecloth in a colander.  After sediment has settled, siphon off the clear cordial mixture and decant.  This is really smooth and friends are still asking if I have the recipe.  I hope that you enjoy it.

name: Gingered Watermelon Juice
directions: Place the watermelon and ginger in a blender.
Process for 2 minutes, or until smooth.
Add 6 ice cubes and process until the ice is crushed.
Pour into chilled glasses and garnish with a thin slice of watermelon.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Basil Margarita
directions: Place sugar and water in a microwave safe bowl.
Zest the oranges with a vegetable peeler and add to bowl. Stir.
Heat mixture in the microwave until boiling and sugar is dissolved.
Crush basil to release flavor and add to bowl, allow mixture (syrup at this point) to cool.
Add sour mix to pitcher.
Place a fine mesh strainer over the pitcher and squeeze the zested oranges and the limes through it.
Pour the syrup through strainer into the pitcher.
Add tequila and ice.
Serve with orange slices and basil for garnish.

name: P90x Banana Berry Protein Smoothie
directions: Blend all well in blender until smooth.

name: Honey Deuce
directions: Fill a highball or double old-fashioned glass with crushed ice.  Add Grey
Goose vodka and fill the rest of the cup with lemonade to a half-inch below the
rim.  Drizzle premium raspberry-flavored liqueur over the top.  Garnish with
frozen honeydew.

name: Sunday Morning Bliss
directions: Pour ingredients into a 16 oz glass filled up with ice cubes and stir.

name: Fruited Water (Apples, Oranges and Strawberries)
directions: I have a really big pretty canister, so I fill mine with water 2/3 the way full.
Then I add a few apple slices and orange slices.
Then I add some ice.
Then I add the strawberries.
Then I add more ice and I slide the remaining apples and oranges around the sides of the jar really pretty letting the ice hold them in place.

name: Pomegranate Spritzer
directions: Muddle 1/2 of a lemon.  Add pomegranate juice, agave nectar and ice.
Pour into a shaker,  Shake and top off with club soda.
NOTE:  For an adult drink, add vodka, rum or tequila to the mix.,.

name: Rhubarb Syrup
directions: Wash the rhubarb in cold water, trim the ends, and cut into 1/2 inch pieces. (There's no need to peel them or worry about the fibers, as these simply meltdown.).

Place the fruit in a 6 to 8 quart pot and add cold water to cover. Bring to a boil, immediately reduce the heat to a low simmer, and cover, stirring occasionally. When all the chunks have broken down into a uniform soup, about 20 minutes or so, remove it from the heat. Uncover
and allow to cool.

As soon as it is cool enough to handle, ladle into a fine mesh strainer over a spouted collecting bowl. (You may have to do this in batches.) The pulp will become a mass, so stirring it in the strainer with a wooden spoon will allow it to drain better.
Once it's drained, put the pulp and the syrup into separate containers and refrigerate immediately.
Makes 2 plus liters of syrup and 2 lb of pulp.
Will keep for a week refrigerated or you can process it for longer storage. Process jars in a boiling water bath for 10 minutes.
Adjust time according to your altitude. You need 1/4" headspace.

name: Pear and Sparkling Cider Cocktails
directions: Stir together pear nectar, cider, seltzer, and whiskey in a pitcher.
Divide pear wedges among glasses, and pour in cocktail.
Serve immediately.

name: Autumn Apple Liquor
directions: Put apples slices, sugars, honey, dried cranberries, apple juice. lemon juice and mulling spices in a one gallon jar with a tight fitting lid.  Close lid and shake well over your kitchen sink.  Open jar and add vodka.  Add apple juice as needed to top off the jar.  Transfer jar to refrigerator and keep cold for at least a week.  After infusion time has passed, filter liquid through cheesecloth and a strainer or colander twice.  Discard fruit.  Bottle liquor in a wire stopper bottle.  Enjoy responsibly with friends and family to celebrate Autumn.

name: Sugar Free Oranage Juice Substitute
directions: Put tea bags into heat proof pitcher.
Boil filtered water and poor over tea bags and let them soak, the longer they soak, the stronger the flavor.  However, after 15 minute - it makes no more difference.
Remove tea bags and put pitchter in refidgerator after it's cooled to room tempertature.
Tomorrow morning you will have a sugar free orange juice!

name: Jolly Cranberry Juice Sangria
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pretty glass decanter.  Chill at least 4 hours or overnight.
Stir well and serve over ice.  Garnish with extra orange slice if desired.

name: Cherry Velvet Limeade Mocktail
directions: Place the lime juice and agave in a saucepan and stir on a low heat until agave is fully dissolved – about 1 minute. Allow this syrup to cool.
Place the syrup in your blender with the cherries and whole lime, and puree in the blender until nice and frothy.
Transfer to a glass jug and pour in the desired amount of sparkling water.
Garnish with mint leaves and lime wedges.
You could add a squeeze of fresh ginger juice for an added zing. YUM!

name: Cayenne Lemon Tonic
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
If you are using raw honey ,you may want to heat the water to just under a boil before mixing with the honey,to ensure it all mixes together smoothly.
Serve by the shot glass as is or serve 1/2 cup in warmed mugs.

similar.name: Hawthorn Berry, Lemon Rind and Lime Blossom Tea
Lemons & Limes With Vinegar & Salt Brine

name: Double Grape Slushies
directions: Pour juice into a blender.
Drop in the fruit and ice.
Put the lid on and blend until smooth.
Pour into 4 glasses and serve. Enjoy!

name: Homemade Dried Fruit and Herb Tea
directions: Preheat oven to 250°F

Toss lemon zest, orange zest, ginger and fennel(if using licorice or star anise do not use here) together on a large parchment paper-lined baking sheet. Scatter mint on a second large parchment paper-lined baking sheet and bake, rotating baking sheets and stirring occasionally, until ginger mixture and mint are both dried out, 10 to 15 minutes for the mint and about 45 minutes for the ginger mixture; set both aside to let cool completely.

Crumble mint into a medium bowl then add ginger mixture and cranberries or apricots and toss. For each serving of tea, steep 2 tablespoons of the mixture(if using licorice or star anise, add here) together with 1 cup hot water for 5 minutes. Strain and serve.

name: Clementine Cosmos
directions: Chill 6-8 martini glasses by filling with ice and water. Set aside while you prepare the beverage.

To make simple syrup, add sugar and water to medium saucepan. Juice the clementine quarters into the pan by squeezing them and then drop the spent rinds into the pan. Simmer until thickened, about 10 minutes. Strain into a glass measuring cup and set aside to cool.

To make the cosmos, place the cooled clementine simple syrup into a cocktail pitcher. Add the cranberry juice, lime juice, and vanilla vodka. Cover the pitcher and shake vigorously to blend or stir vigorously. Pour into empty chilled martini glasses.
Garnish with a slice of clementine and serve.

name: Whiskey Old Fashioned
directions: First you will want to grab a cocktail or rocks glass to mix your drink into.
Then, place a slice of lemon, orange, and a maraschino cherry into the glass.
Pour about two tablespoons of the maraschino cherry juice in with the fruit.
Next you will want to add about a spoonful of sugar.
Once the sugar is in the glass, pour in some club soda. You will only want to add about 1.5-2 ounces.
Next add just a dash of bitters, it's the secret to a good old fashioned.

Once you have reached this point in the drink where there is fruit, sugar, club soda, and bitters you are going to want to stir and mesh up your fruit in the bottom of the glass to release and mix the juices.
Once you have thoroughly mixed and meshed the juices, fill the rest of the glass with ice.
Now it is time to add the whiskey. Pour 1.5 to 2 shots of bourbon whiskey into the glass.
Lastly, Stir your drink and ad a lemon slice as a garnish on your glass. Enjoy!

similar.name: Sally's Special Apricot Brandy Whiskey Sours

name: Moo Juicers
directions: Place juice concentrate in a pitcher. Using the juice concentrate can add three cans of milk. Stir until combined. Refrigerate, covered, for up to 4 days. Stir before serving. (Do not use frozen lemonade or limeade concentrate).
Variation: Add 2 tablespoons sugar to juice and milk mixture. Pour into 6 - 5ounce paper cups. Freeze until nearly firm, about 4 hours.

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home White Gummi Bear Smoothie
Jamba Juice at Home Strawberry Shortcake Smoothie

name: Chocolate-Covered Herry Martini
directions: Drain cherries, reserving juice. Put 3/4 cup juice in a 1 gallon pitcher or other container. Save the rest of the juice for another use, such as a topping for ice cream or a flavoring for milk.

Add vodka and chocolate liqueur to the cherry juice; mix well. Add maraschino cherries. The liquid must cover cherries. If not, add more chocolate liquer. Let stand at room temperature for 2-12 hours. If not using within 12 hours., refrigerate mixture. It will keep up to 1 week, if cherries are covered with liquid and mixture is in a sealed container.
To serve beverage, pour liquid into a drink shaker filled with ice. Shake well and pour into martini glasses or other drink glasses. Garnish with a fresh maraschino cherry.

Note: After drink liquid is used, cherries can be drained and covered with melted chocolate. Melt 2 cups semisweet chocolate chips in the microwave for approximately 2 minutes. Dip cherries in melted chocolate; let set on waxed paper for about 30 minutes.

name: Orange Breeze
directions: In a blender combine the orange juice, milk, sugar and vanilla - blend until mixed.
With the blender running, add ice cubes, 1 at a time, through the lid opening.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into tall glasses and garnish with orange slices if desired.

name: Homemade Ginger Cardamom Soda With Lime
directions: In a small, dry pot, toast cardamom over medium heat until fragrant.
Remove  the pot from the heat. Add ginger, sugar, water, and lime zest. Place back on heat and simmer until sugar is dissolved, about 5 minutes. Cool syrup; strain and discard solids.
In a cocktail shaker(or a jar with lid), add 1 oz. syrup (or to taste) and lime juice. Add ice and shake to blend. Divide between two tall glasses, filled with ice.
Top with sparkling water, club soda, or sparkling cider. Stir gently and serve immediately.
Enjoy!

name: Banana Frosty
directions: Peel bananas and cut in pieces.
Combine juice and bananas in blender, then mix until creamy.
Blend in chilled fruit and vanilla.

name: Apple Foam
directions: chill juices.
beat egg whites until stiff;add sugar substitute whill beating.
add apple & lemon juices;pour into fruit cups.
mix sugar substitue & cinnimon,enough to sprinkle on fruit juice mixture.

name: Lime, Plum, Grape, Scallion, Cilantro Juice
directions: Peel and remove any seeds from the lime.  Chop up the plum, leaving skin on if desired, and removing the core.
De-stem the seedless grapes, chop the scallion and cilantro stalks (not just the stems, but that is what the system is defaulting to).
Mix with a little water in a blender or use a "Smart Stick".
Pour into tall glass, and add seltzer to desired level of juiciness, and gently mix with a spoon.

similar.name: Blood Orange, Plum and Grape Juice

name: Blood Orange, Plum and Grape Juice
directions: Peel the orange (leave some zest), chop and remove any seeds.
De-stem the grapes (I used white).
Chop and core the plum.  Keep or remove the skin, depending on preference.
Blenderize all items with just a little water.
Add selzer water or regular water if you wish, to bring beverage to desired thickness.  Stir gently with a spoon.

similar.name: Blood Plum and Rose Water Martini
Lime, Plum, Grape, Scallion, Cilantro Juice

name: Snazzy Juice for Juicing Juicers
directions: Wash and Cut up fruit.
Add to Juicer and process.
May cut juice with water if it's too strong for you.

name: Caribbean Dream Cocktail
directions: Blend all ingredients until smooth.
Serve with extra crushed ice and decorate with brown sugar and a banana slice.

similar.name: Creamy Clouds over Tranquil Turquoise  Seas

name: Agua De Guayaba  (Guava Drink)
directions: Wash guavas well and cut off any brown stems.Cut in half and place in a blender skin and all(unless you think your guavas may have been sprayed with something that won't come off with a good washing-then just scoop out the pulp )You should taste the fruit to see how sweet it is.
Squeeze the juice from the lemon and add honey or sugar,adjusting amount to suit the sweetness of the guavas and your own taste.Add water and blend about 2 minutes.
Strain well and serve over ice.

name: Agua Fresca De Tres Citricos-Triple Citrus Agua Fresca
directions: Juice all fruits on a citrus juicer,straining out seeds.
Add sugar and stir well to dissolve.Add water and stir.
Chill for at least an hour before serving.

name: Pumpkin Pie Jell-O Shots
directions: Arrange the piecrusts on a baking sheet. Place 1 cup cold water in the top of a double boiler and sprinkle the gelatin over the top. Let stand for three minutes.

Heat the gelatin mixture over a gentle simmer until the granules have dissolved. Add the pumpkin, sugar and spices and heat, stirring occasionally, until the pumpkin and sugar are completely melted. Remove from heat and cool for 30 minutes.

In a medium bowl, combine the vodka with 1/4 cup cold water and the heavy cream. Whisk in the pumpkin mixture and immediately divide it among the piecrusts. Chill until firm, at least 4 hours. Slice the pies into wedges, if desired, top with whipped cream and serve.

similar.name: Apple Pie Shots( Alcoholic Not for Kids)
Black Pepper Strawberries-And-Cream Gelly Shots (Jello Shots)
Peach Pie Moonshine a La Mode

name: Watermelon Slushie
directions: In blender, combine watermelon, pomergranate juice, and ice. Blend until smooth.
Pour into tall glass.

similar.name: Low Cal, Low Carb, No Fat Lemon Slushie

name: Replenishing Green Juice (For Your Juicer)
directions: 1. Juice apples, cucumber and ginger.
2. Pour into glass(es) and enjoy!

name: Berry and Banana Blend
directions: Combine milk and ice cubes in a blender, cover, and whip until icy smooth.
Add fruit and whip again.
Add yogurt, vanilla extract, and cinnamon, then blend until combined. Serve immediately.

name: Peach Raspberry Bellini Iced Tea
directions: Brew tea by adding the entire 100g tin of leaves to 12-cup coffee maker's filter basket. Use 12 cups water.  As soon as it has brewed, pour into a pitcher and refrigerate until very cold.  (This is double-strength.).
In a bowl, mix peaches, sugar and raspberry syrup.  Refrigerate until peaches are thawed and sugar is dissolved.  Stir frequently.
To make tea:
Fill a glass with ice.  Add some peaches and 2-4 Tablespoons of syrup over ice.  Fill glass with cold tea and top with a few fresh raspberries. Stir and enjoy!

name: Raindrop Raspberry Tea
directions: In a large saucepan, bring water to a boil. Remove from the heat; add tea bags. Cover and steep for 5 minutes. Discard tea bags. Stir in sugar until dissolved. Add cold water and juice concentrate; mix well.
Serve over ice.

name: Melon Frappe"
directions: Puree cantaloupe and ginger in blender.
Add milk. yogurt, ice cubes and honey and puree.
Makes 2 cups.

name: Mug 'o Pumpkin Creme
directions: Combine all ingredients, except the sweetener, in a small pot. Stir well. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
Once mixture begins to froth, continue to boil for 1 minute. Remove from heat and pour into a mug.
Allow to cool slightly. Sweeten, to taste, with your sugar substitute of choice and enjoy!

name: Turmeric Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil and add turmeric.  Reduce heat and allow to simmer for 8-10 minutes.
Add milk, lemon juice and almond oil.  Stir well.
Strain into a cup and add sweetener if desired.

name: Captivating Champagne
directions: Chill champagne flutes.
Pour 2 ounces of St. Germain in to each glass.
Top with Champagne.
Garnish with a lychee.
Optional:
If using canned lychee`s you might want to add some of the juice to each drink for more sweetness.

name: The Black Friars Cobbler Cocktail
directions: Using muddler, muddle 10 blackberries in cocktail shaker. Add sloe gin, mexcal, lemon juice, and cane syrup. Shake without ice until well blended, about 10 times. Divide between 2 large rocks glasses, Fill each glass with enough cruwshed ice to reach top of glass. Garnish with additional blackberries and serve.

name: Coconut Margarita
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees. Toss the coconut with the salt on a rimmed baking sheet. Toast this in the oven, stirring frequently until golden brown, which should take 8 to 10 minutes. Once the mixture is cool, crush it with your hands until it is crumbly.
Pour 2 tablespoons of lime juice into a shallow dish. Dip the rims of the cocktail glasses in lime juice, then into coconut mixture, coating it well.
Combine the remaining ingredients with 1 cup ice in a blender and puree until the mixture is smooth. Pour evenly in prepared glasses and serve immediately.

name: Rosemary Lemon Rhubarb Spritzer
directions: In a medium sauce pan bring rhubarb pieces, water, sugar and rosemary to a boil. Reduce the heat and simmer for about 15 minutes. The rhubarb will disingrate.
Strain the mixture through a fine mesh strainer and add the lemon juice. Chill until ready to serve.
To serve, fill a glass between a quarter or half full of the syrup and the rest with soda water.

name: Hibiscus Cooler - Herbal Tea Lemonade
directions: In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil.
Off the heat. Add Tazo Passion tea bags and let steep 5-10 minutes.
Remove tea bags.
Pour tea into a large pitcher.
Add about 2/3 of the can (or 8 ounces) of frozen lemonade concentrate.
Stir to dissolve and let cool a bit before refrigerating until completely chilled.
Pour over ice in a glass decorated with a fresh lime wedge. Enjoy!

name: Peach Ginger Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender, puree until smooth.

name: Brandy Abacaxi
directions: Put 2 or 3 cubes of ice in a tumbler, add brandy and pineapple juice and stir. Top up with cava or sparkling wine.
Garnish with a wedge of pineapple.

name: Wild African Berry
directions: Add first 3 ingredients to a cocktail shaker filled with ice and shake sharply.
Strain into rock glass.
Garnish with strawberry slice (eat the rest of the strawberry :) ).

name: Pungo Pirate Cocktail
directions: Cinnamon Syrup:
Create a cinnamon syrup by adding 1 cup sugar, 1 cup water and 3 cinnamon sticks to a saucepan, bringing to a boil, removing from heat and allowing to steep until the desired flavor is reached.
Cocktail:
In a tall glass, muddle 3 sliced, ripe strawberries and 1 ounce cinnamon syrup together.
Fill glass with ice, add 2 ounces of spiced rum and top with 3 ounces of ginger ale; garnish with a ripe strawberry.
Enjoy!

name: Hawaiian Margarita
directions: Add all ingredients to a blender.
Blend until slushy and strain into a Margarita glass.

name: South Pacific Wiki Waki Woo(Non Alcoholic)
directions: Combine the juices, extract if using and club soda.
Place ice in a tall glass and pour in juice mixture.
Garnish with a slice of pineapple and a cherry if you like.
Serve with a straw.

name: Black Currant or Blueberry Iced Tea
directions: Steep tea in 8 cups (2 L) boiling water for 5 minutes. Discard bags.
Meanwhile, in large saucepan, bring currants or blueberries, sugar and 1 cup  water to boil.
Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer, stirring, until fruit breaks down (about 5 minutes).
Add to tea; let cool to room temperature (about 30 minutes).
Refrigerate until cold (about 2 hours).
Strain through cheesecloth-lined sieve into pitcher, pressing solids only gently so beverage remains clear.
Serve with ice cubes.

name: Banana Cow (Hawaiian Rum Drink)
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Blend at high speed for 20-30 seconds, or until mixture is smooth and frothy.
Serve immediately.

name: Fijian Passion Cocktail
directions: Combine juices, rum and Triple Sec.
Fill blender with crushed ice.
Blend until slushy.
Serve in margarita glasses, garnished with fruit.

name: Swiss Strawberry Sours
directions: Mix all in blender. Add enough ice to make it slushy.
Use my Frozen Swiss Strawberries recipe and skip the confectioners sugar.

name: Passion Fruit Mimosa
directions: Add ice to champagne flutes.  Fill half of a champagne flute with chilled champagne, then top off with chilled passion fruit juice.
Slice up a strawberry or orange to decorate the rim of each flute.

name: Hawaiian Soda
directions: Place about 2 tablespoons pineapple, 2 teaspoons cherries and 1 rounded tablespoon of bananas in each of 6 tall glasses.
Top each with a scoop of ice cream, stir to blend in the fruits.
Fill glasses almost to the top with orange soda.
Fill glasses with remaining ice cream.
Grab a spoon and a straw and enjoy!

name: Tiki Tini
directions: Combine all the ingredients in a shaker with ice. Shake vigorously until well mixed and the coconut cream has thoroughly blended with the other ingredients.

name: Homemade Cassis (Martha Stewart)
directions: Place the currants in a medium saucepan and mash with a potato masher.
Add the sugar and 1 cup of water; simmer over medium heat until the sugar is dissolved and the fruit has released its juices, about 5 minutes.
Turn off the heat, add the Brandy or Cognac, and carefully pour into a glass jar. Tightly seal the jar and store it in the refrigerator for a week.
Strain the mixture into a bowl, then strain again through a sieve lined with cheesecloth into a clean jar.
To allow the flavors to develop, store at least 1 week in the refrigerator before using.

similar.name: Lamb's Wool (Hot mulled beer with Apples)

name: Pacific Island Beer
directions: Mix well and freeze mixture overnight.
For one glass, put 1 cup of frozen mixture in a tall glass.
Pour lemon-lime soda or ginger ale over mixture.
Add a long straw and a little paper parasol.

name: Safari Cocktail - Mount Kenya Safari Club
directions: Place the pineapple slices in a bowl and sprinkle with the chopped mint.
Pour the vodka over top and refrigerate for 1 hour.
Half an hour before serving, run cocktail glasses under cold water and place in the freezer,
Just before serving, purée the vodka-pineapple-mint mixture in a blender with a little green food coloring. Pour into frosted glasses.
Garnish with a mint leaf and a cube of fresh pineapple and a green cherry on a pick.

similar.name: Iced Hibiscus Tea With  Pineapple (Burkina Faso)

name: Hot Quinoa Drink
directions: Place quinoa and 2 cups water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover and simmer 15 minutes or until quinoa is tender.
Drain well and  return quinoa to saucepan.
Add soymilk, apples, sugar and cinnamon. Bring to a simmer over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium and simmer 5 minutes.
Transfer mixture to a blender, add vanilla and puree until smooth.
Serve hot.

similar.name: Mexican Hot Chocolate With Coconut Whipped Cream

name: Hawaiian Pineapple Iced Tea
directions: Place tea bags and bring to boil.
Add 2 cups of boiling water.
Add fresh mint leaves.
After 10 minutes remove tea bags and mint leaves.
Add sugar or sweetener.
If you use fresh pineapple: Blend with the food processor the pineapple together with the iced water. If you prefer a clear drink, filter this juice. Add to the tea.
If you use pineapple juice: Simply add pineapple juice and water to the tea.
Add lemon juice, stir well and refrigerate.
Serve it cold.

similar.name: Iced Hibiscus Tea With  Pineapple (Burkina Faso)

name: Pisco Sour
directions: Make sugar syrup: Put sugar and water in a pot and bring to a boil. Boil for 1 minute, remove from heat, and let cool.
Place sugar syrup, lemon juice. pisco, egg whites, and ice in a blender, and mix until very frothy.
Serve in small tumblers, with a dash of bitters in the middle of the foam.

name: Apricot Bellinis
directions: Process half each of apricot halves, apricot nectar, and sugar in a blender until smooth, stopping to scrape down sides.  Repeat with remaining apricot halves, nectar, and sugar.

Serve over crushed ice with sparkling wine/Champagne or ginger ale/lemon-lime soda.  Garnish, if desired.     * Note: You can stir together the the apricot mixture and the sparking wine/Champagne/soda in a picture.  Be sure and do this just before serving.

name: Menehune Juice
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into an old fashioned glass filled with crushed ice.
Garnish with lime and mint.

name: Honolulu Lulu
directions: Blend all ingredients with 12 oz. glass of shaved ice in blender until liquid is semi-frozen.
Serve in a stemmed cocktail glass.

similar.name: South Pacific Wiki Waki Woo(Non Alcoholic)

name: Siesta - Grapefruit Margarita
directions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add tequila, Campari, lime juice, grapefruit juice, and simple syrup.
Shake well and strain into a chilled coupe. Garnish with grapefruit twist.

similar.name: Beer " a Summer Refreshing Tex Mex  Drink"

name: Ku'u Pua Cocktail
directions: Rim a martini glass with the sugar.  Filla shaker with ice.  Add the fresh fruit and muddle.  Add the vodka, juices and coconut syrup; shake vigorously.  Strain into the glass.  Garnish with the pineapple cube rolled in more sugar.

name: Dove Cocktail
directions: Rim 4 tall Collins-type glasses with lime wedge and then dip in sugar.
Fill glasses with ice cubes.
In a large measuring cup combine tequila, orange liqueur, lime juice and pomegranate juice.
Divide cocktail between the 4 glasses.
Top with club soda and garnish with lime wedges and pomegranate seeds.

name: Guava Margarita
directions: Rub a lime wedge around the edges of a margarita glasses and dip immediately in the margarita salt, if desired, turning to coat.
Place in the freezer for 10 minutes.
In a blender, combine the ice, lime juice, tequila, Triple Sec, Simple Syrup, and guava juice and blend until combined and ice cubes are crushed.
Pour into the chilled glasses, garnish each with a lime slice, and serve immediately.
Simple Syrup:
Combine sugar and water in a small saucepan and bring to a boil over medium-high heat.
Cook until sugar is dissolved, about 2 minutes.
Remove from the heat and cool completely.

name: Passion Fruit and Pisco Cocktail
directions: Cut the passion fruits in halves. Extract the pulp and blend it. You may try turning the blender on and off quickly, 2 or 3 times, to separate the seeds from the pulp. Strain.
Add as much water as there is juice so its half and half.  Add sugar and pisco. Mix until the sugar get dissolved.
Serve over ice.

name: Punch a La Noix Coco
directions: Put the coconut in a bowl.
Add the rum and allow it to soak for 1 hour.
Strain off the rum into another bowl.
Place the rum-soaked coconut in a square of cheesecloth and squeeze it into the rum bowl.
Discard the coconut.
Add the sugar, vanilla bean, lemon zest, and nutmeg to the bowl.
Stir to mix well.
Serve over ice and garnish with slices of coconut (if desired).

name: South African Homemade Lemonade
directions: The secret to perfect lemonade is to make a simple syrup by dissolving the sugar in warm water so that it’s dispersed evenly instead of sinking to the bottom. So if you have a stove handy, heat the sugar and water in a small saucepan and stir until its completely dissolved; otherwise just stir very well.
Extract the juice from the lemons. I use my Granny’s juicer but you can do this anyway you like.
Pour the juice and sugar water into a jug, throw in the raisins and leave for a while, overnight if possible, to allow them to start fermenting and give it a fizz.

Before serving add about two cups of cold water and a bag of ice to the jug – more or less, depending on how strong you want it to be. If the lemonade is still a little sweet for anyone’s taste, chuck a slice or two of lemon into the glass.

name: Pawpaw Paradise
directions: Cut in small pieces and puree in electric blender.
Add milk and other ingredients; blend until thoroughly smooth.
Serve in 4 oz. glasses, garnished with a strawberry.

name: Hawaiian Plantation Iced Tea
directions: Pour the barely boiling hot water into a large pitcher, and add the tea bags. Steep the tea 2 to 4 minutes.
Remove the tea bags, and pour in the ice water.
Pour in the pineapple juice.
Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, about 1 1/2 hours.
Pour the tea over ice, garnish with pineapple spears, and serve.

name: Coquito
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients including ice cubes until completely mixed.  Pour into long glasses over more ice.

name: Poires Belle-Helene
directions: Poach pears and allow to cool. Cut them in half, core them and leave the stems intact.
For serving, scoop ice cream into a large bowl or large wine or brandy glass. Place one pear half (artfully) on top of the ice cream scoop. Top with warm Somebody's Mother's Chocolate Sauce.

similar.name: Elegant Strawberries in Flute W/ Ganache Sauce

name: Blackberry Sweet Tea
directions: Combine blackberries and sugar in a large container, and crush with a wooden spoon; stir in mint and baking soda(if using).
Boill 4 cups of water and pour over tea bags; cover and steep 5 minutes. Discard tea bags.
Pour tea over blackberry mixture; let stand at room temperature 1 hour.
Pour tea through a wire-mesh strainer into a large pitcher, discarding solids. Add 2 1/2 cups cold water, stirring until sugar dissolves. Cover and chill 1 hour.
Garnish, if desired.

similar.name: Homemade Dried Fruit and Herb Tea

name: Ginger Peach Margaritas
directions: Place pureed peaches, ginger syrup, lime juice and peach juice or nectar in a blender and mix together. Pour the mixture into a bowl and place in the freezer. When ready to serve, add the alcohol. Combine well, pour into glasses, garnish and serve.
Note:  You can, also, double the recipe and place the mixture into an ice cream maker and make a lot for a party. With this method, the mixture stays frozen longer and has a better consistency.

name: Blueberry Green Tea Slushy
directions: Bring 2 cups of water to a boil. Add the tea bags and let steep for about 5-7 minutes. Remove the tea bags and discard.
Divide the cup of blueberries between the compartments of an ice cube tray. Cover with tea(about 1/2 cup) and freeze.
Puree tea ice cubes in a blender with remaining tea(1 1/2 cups), 1/2 cup water and 2 tbls. agave syrup.
Serve garnished with berries. Enjoy!

similar.name: Homemade Dried Fruit and Herb Tea

name: Fresh Coconut Milk
directions: Preheat oven to 400°F.
Use a metal skewer or ice pick to pierce two of the soft spots at the top, where the "eyes" are. Drain the liquid and save for use in other recipes.
Place the coconut on a cookie sheet and bake for 15 minutes. Remove from oven and let it cool until it can be handled (about 5 minutes).
If it is not already cracked open, place the coconut on a hard surface and tap with a hammer until the shell breaks.
Remove the white flesh with a spoon or table knife. Peel off the thin, brown inner skin with a vegetable peeler.
Grate the coconut pieces on the fine side of a manual grater or cut into coarse pieces and grind in a food processor.
In a blender (or food processor fitted with the metal blade), process the coconut and hot water for about 2 minutes. Let cool for 5 minutes.
Strain the mixture through a coffee filter into a small bowl, pressing down hard on the solid grated coconut flesh to squeeze out all the liquid. For thinner milk, add a little more water.
Use in any recipe calling for coconut milk.
Note: Fresh coconut milk should be used immediately, it loses its flavor even if refrigerated.

name: Pineapple Water
directions: Slice pineapple, and place in a large drink dispenser with a serving spout at the bottom.
Add the ice and water.
Chill.

name: Cuba Libre
directions: Fill 4 tall glasses with ice.
Pour 1/2 ounce rum into each glass.
Squeeze and drop 1 lime wedge into each glass.
Fill each glass with cola and stir well.
Serve immediately.

name: Tahitian Tattoo Cocktail
directions: Add all ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour into a chilled Tiki mug or a tall glass with a couple of ice cubes and garnish with a pineapple slice.

name: The Sweet Melissa Baking Book: Sparkling Strawberry Lemonade
directions: To make the strawberry syrup, combine the strawberries, sugar, lemon juice, water and salt in the bowl of a food processor or blender.  Puree until smooth.  Pour the mixture through a fine mesh strainer to remove the seeds, pressing down to extract as much liquid as possible.
To make the lemonade, combine the hot water and sugar in a pitcher. Stir until the sugar is dissolved. Mix in the lemon juice and water. Stir in the strawberry puree.

To serve, rub a wedge of lemon or one of the spent lemon halves around the rim of a glass and then dip in sugar. Fill with ice if desired and then lemonade. Garnish with sliced lemon or strawberries or sprigs of fresh lemon balm. Serve immediately.

similar.name: Spiced Strawberry Syrup ( and Shrub Recipe)

name: Sparkling Ginger-Orange Cocktails / Mocktails
directions: COCKTAIL:
Place 1 tablespoon finely grated ginger in a piece of cheesecloth, and squeeze juice from ginger into a large pitcher; discard cheesecloth and solids.
Stir 2 bottles sparkling wine, 1 container orange juice, and 1 can chilled pineapple juice into ginger juice.
Serve over ice, with orange slices and fresh mint sprigs for garnish.
MOCKTAIL:
In a large pitcher, stir together 1 container orange juice, 1 bottle chilled ginger ale, and 1 can chilled pineapple juice.
Serve over ice, with orange slices and fresh mint sprigs for garnish.

name: Accidentally Juiced Up
directions: Mix all 3 ingredients together in a pour-able container.
Serve over ice in your favourite bevvie receptacle.
Enjoy!

name: Frosty Pineapple Nog
directions: In a blender, combine buttermilk, pineapple, sugar & vanilla, then cover & blend for 45 seconds or until well combined.
With the blender running, add ice cubes, one at a time, through the opening in the lid, then blend until mixture is frothy & nearly smooth.
Nice when served in chilled glasses.

name: Rhubarb Slushies
directions: Boil rhubarb in water until soft and mushy.  Strain - saving the juice (discard the pulp).  Add sugar and jello - stir until disolved.  Add vodka and lemon juice - stir and put in a container (ice cream bucket/plastic coffee container, etc.).  Freeze overnight (at least).
This will not freeze solid due to the vodka however, it will be slushy.
When serving - fill glass 1/2 to 3/4 full with slushy.  Top off with 7up.
Enjoy!
(I quessed on the number of servings and the prep time.  It has to freeze overnight or 12 hours or so.).

name: Muesli With Strawberries and Hazelnuts
directions: Place the oats and sultanas in a large bowl and add the milk.
Stir to mix evenly, then cover and place in the refrigerator.
Leave to soak overnight.
The following day, just before eating, grate the apple, discarding the core. Toss the apple in the lemon juice to prevent the apple from browning.
Stir the hazelnuts, pumpkin seeds and sesame seeds into the oat mixture, then stir in the grated apple and strawberries.
To serve, divide the muesli among 4 cereal bowls, and top each with a spoonful of yogourt and honey.

name: Pear Spin Cocktail
directions: Mix the pear juice, the rum and the sparkling water on top of the ice.
Add sugar to taste.

name: Honey Banana Bread
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F and lightly spray a loaf pan with cooking spray.
Mash the bananas, whisk in the applesauce, oil, sugar, honey and molasses until just combined.
In a separate bowl, stir together the flours, soda, cinnamon and salt.
Stir the wet and dry ingredients together until just combined.
Spread the bread mixture evenly in the prepared pan and bake for 45-50 minutes or until lightly brown and a toothpick inserted in the middle comes out clean.

name: Water Your Melon
directions: Mix and enjoy!

name: Acapulco Gold Mocktail
directions: Shake all of the ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker or a jar with lid.
Strain into a cocktail glass and serve.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Puerto Rican Coquito by the Pitcher

name: Tropical Wave Mocktail
directions: Place juices in a glass and top with soda water.
Stir and serve in a cocktail glass over ice.
Enjoy!

name: Caribbean Cocktail Mocktail
directions: Blend ingredients together in a blender with the cracked ice.
Strain(or not) into chilled cocktail glasses.
Garnish with a slice of mango and serve.
Enjoy!

name: Salty Dog Without the Bite
directions: Wet rim of glass with  some water(or grapefruit juice) on a plate or shallow dish.
Pour  chilled grapefuit juice into glass carefully, so as not to disturb the salted rim. Now pour in club soda if using. Add in a little crushed ice if desired.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Cranberry Cream Mocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender with cracked ice. Blend until smooth.
Serve in a wine glass and enjoy!

name: Mexican Sunrise
directions: Blend until slushy and strain(you don't have to strain).
Serve in tall glass with ice.
Garnish with strawberries.

similar.name: Mexican Dream For A King And Queen!

name: Pony's Neck
directions: Shake all ingredients together with ice.
Strain into a glass and serve, or you may serve with the ice.
Garnish with  lime peel if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry and Lavender Pastis Spritzer
directions: Rub rim of glass with a lavender flower and lemon verbena leaf (or lemon balm).
Pour in the tangerine juice and sparkling mineral water; stir in the pastis (to taste).
Add sliced strawberries and ice.
Serve decorated with sprigs of fresh lemon verbena (or lemon balm) and lavender flowers. Enjoy!

name: Beachcomber Mocktail
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker(or jar filled with ice).
Shake well and strain into tall glasses to serve.
Enjoy!

name: Cherry Stone Liqueur
directions: Wash and thouroughly dry the cherry stones. Crush them with a heavy rolling pin and put them in a jar with the brandy. Add the sugar, cover and shake well.
Leave in a warm place for about 1 month. Strain and pour into sterilized bottles and cork tightly.
Note: Other stone fruits, one type only or a mixture, can also be made into liqueurs.

name: Plum Liqueur
directions: Prick the plums very well and put in a jar or bottle with the sugar. Cover tightly and leave to stand for 2-3 days or until the juice runs freely.
Pour in the gin and cover tightly. Leave in a warm place for about 2 months.
Strain, squeezing out as much juice as possible, and pour into sterilized bottles and cork tightly.

name: Flamingo
directions: Combine rum and juice in a cocktail shaker and fill with ice; shake until chilled. Strain into rocks glass and fill with ice; add soda, and garnish with lime.

name: Limeade I
directions: Cut limes into fourths and squeeze into the bottom of a 2 quart pitcher, cut the pulp off the limes and put into the pitcher if desired.
Add the sugar and sugar substitute.
Fill with 2 quarts of water and stir.

name: Jackfruit  Vegan Smoothie
directions: Place jackfruit, soy yogurt, soy milk, and maple syrup or agave nectar in immersion blender container or blender and blend until smooth.
Serve over ice and enjoy.

name: Frozen Pineapple Daiquiris
directions: In the container of a blender, combine pineapple, rum, pineapple juice, simple syrup, and lime juice; process until well-blended. Add ice and blend until smooth. Garnish with pineapple wedges.

name: Strawberry Banana Smoothie
directions: Cut strawberries and bananas
then dump bananas in strawberries.
in bowl.
put ice cube  in blender.
dump the bananas and strawberries.
half cup of strawberry juice.
1/3 cup of pineapplee juice.
blend into smooth then pour glass ready to serve.

name: Cocktail - Dolce Limon
directions: Shake and serve in an 8-ounce glass with crushed ice.

similar.name: Cucumber, Kumquat, and Mint Vodka Cocktail

name: Truth Serum 2.0 Margarita
directions: Mix the lime juice, tequila and, water agave syrup in a measuring cup.  Stir until the syrup is fully incorporated with the liquids.
Take a lime wedge and run it around the rim of a glass; dip the glass into the salt/sugar mixture; take any excess salt/sugar off rim to make it look pretty!
Fill the glass just halfway with margarita mix, fill the glass the rest of the way with ice cubes and stir.
Pour a small "dollop" of orange liqueur on top of the ice (about 2 teaspoons).
Add a lime wedge and serve!
Make the concoction to suit your taste by adding more agave syrup (if you like it sweeter) or lime juice (for a more sour flavor).
Enjoy!

name: Herbal Lemon-Cucumber Water
directions: Place water in a large glass mason jar, or a beverage dispenser.
Add thin slices of cucumber and lemon, and sprigs of fresh lemon verbena (or your favorite herb: try mint, rosemary, scented geranium, lemon balm, basil or lemon thyme).
Cover and chill for several hours or overnight.
To serve, pour over ice into tall glasses and enjoy!

name: Olive Garden Tuscan Tea(Copycat)
directions: To make the lemon syrup:
Heat the water and sugar in a saucepan until the sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat, and add lemon juice to taste.
Store in a covered jar in the refrigerator.
To make the Tuscan tea:
Mix 1/2 cup lemon syrup with the cold tea.
Serve in 2 tall glasses, over ice.
Garnish with lemon wedges.
Enjoy!

name: Fuzz Buster
directions: Combine limeade concentrate, vodka, peaches and schnapps in a blender; process until smooth.
Gradually add ice, processing until mixture reaches desired consistancy.
Serve in stemmed glasses garnished with peach slice (if desired).

name: Homemade Pineapple Vodka (Michael Smith)
directions: Place pineapple chunks in a large jar or resealable container. Pour in vodka and store in the refrigerator for 7 days.
Place the sugar and water in a small saucepan and bring to a boil until the sugar has completely dissolved. Set aside to cool and then refrigerate until ready to use.
Strain the vodka from the pineapple into a clean jar, pressing down on the fruit to extract every bit of juice. (Dare you to try a piece!).
Pour in the syrup and refrigerate for up to 30 days.

name: Sperone Sunrise
directions: Fill rock glass with ice.
Add Limoncello and Orange juice.
Top with a dash of grenadine.

name: Dubai Lemonade
directions: The directions were to blend this until your ears ring.

similar.name: The Bestest Lemonade in the Whole Wide World

name: Citrus Mint Cooler
directions: Mix the mint simple syrup, lemon juice, 7 -up and orange blossom water together.
Pour over ice.
Add the orange and lemon slices (optional).

similar.name: The Bestest Lemonade in the Whole Wide World

name: Taco Bell Pina Colada Fruitista
directions: Place all ingredients into the blender and blend until the ice has been crushed.  Pour into a glass and top with lime slice. The Sierra Mist soda gives this drink a little extra fizz.

name: Apple Iced Tea
directions: Combine the brewed tea, apple cider and sugar, and stir until sugar dissolves.
Add lemon sparkling water, and ice.
Serve.

name: Toddler Mana Milkshake
directions: Put all ingredients in the blender and liquify until all banana chunks are gone.

name: Blue Orange (Cocktail)
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add vodka, orange juice and ginger ale.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: Port of Maine (Cocktail)
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice. Add vodka, cranberry juice, and soda.
Garnish with lemon wheel.

name: Pink Salty Dog (Cocktail)
directions: Place salt in a saucer. Moisten the rim of a glass with a grapefruit slice. Dip rim in salt.
Combine juice and vodka with Campari or grenadine in the jar of a blender; blend. With the motor running, add ice until fully incorporated and slushy. Pour into prepared glass.

name: Pink Ribbon Punch (For the Juicer)
directions: Press all ingredients through a juice extractor and into a measuring cup.
Divide punch evenly between 4 glasses. Stir, and drink immediately.

name: Magic Bullet Strawberry Bellini
directions: Add strawberries and powdered sugar to the tall-cup and blend until smooth with the cross blade.
Spoon contents into four champagne glasses.
Pour cider/champagne over the top.
When enjoying alcoholic beverages, please be responsible and assign a designated driver.

name: Blackberry Lemonade
directions: Blend berries until smooth.
Strain out the seeds in the blueberry mixture.
Add 1 tablespoon of berry puree to every 8 oz of lemonade. Add more of less depending on taste.
Stir and garnish with lemon.

name: Minted Limeade
directions: Remove zest (green part only) from 4 limes with a vegetable peeler.  Set limes aside.
Combine zest with sugar, mint, and 1 cup of the water in a small saucepan.
Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
Reduce heat to low and simmer gently for 5 minutes.
Let cool to room temperature.
Strain into a pitcher.
Juice all the limes.  There should be about 1 cup of juice.
Whisk juice and remaining water into mixture in pitcher.
If not sweet enough, whisk in additional sugar to taste.
Fill tall glasses with ice.
Pour limeade over ice and garnish with sprigs of fresh mint.

name: Strawberry Cooler
directions: Place berries and orange juice in blender and puree until smooth.
Put ice in a tall glass. Pour berry juice mixture over and add lemon soda.

name: Apple Sparkler (Cocktail)
directions: Fill a martini shaker halfway with ice cubes. Add brandy and apple juice. Cover an shake vigorously until very cold.
Strain into 2 champagne glasses. Add 2 tablespoons soda water into each glass and garnish with apple slices.

similar.name: Apple Pie Shots( Alcoholic Not for Kids)

name: Sunny Anderson's Winter Sangria
directions: In a pitcher or punch bowl, whisk the orange juice, orange liqueur and honey.
Add the cinnamon stick, clemetines (or blood oranges), apple and pear and stir to combine.  Set aside at room temperature for at least 1 hour.
Right before serving, add the wine and soda to the fruit mixture and stir gently to combine.
Serve immediately in ice-filled glasses.

name: Hot Caramel Apple Drink
directions: Bring apple juice to a boil. Add 1 tablespoon of cinnamon syrup to the bottom of a 12 ounce mug. Add boiled apple juice. Top with whipped cream, pour caramel syrup generously; let caramel run into juice. Add more whipped cream and caramel, if desired. Sprinkle with nutmeg and cinnamon.
Cinnamon Syrup: Mix all but butter. Boil until thickened. Add butter.

name: Green Juice (For Your Juicer)
directions: Juice all of the ingredients and enjoy the health benefits!

similar.name: Pineapple, Ginger, Celery and Flax Juice (For the Juicer)

name: Strawberry and Peach Frost
directions: Combine all ingredients except ice cubes in a blender. Blend until smooth. Gradually add ice cubes with motor running; blend until smooth.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Strawberry Shortcake Smoothie

name: Maurice's Guaro Sour
directions: Cut up lime.  Place in Shaker.
Add 5 teaspoons sugar.
Use muddler and smash limes until it makes a syrup consistency with the sugar.
Add White Rum and ice.
Shake in shaker.
Pour Strawberry Syrup in to glass.
Add Lemon Lime Soda to glass.
Pour shaker into glass.
Stir.  Drink.  Enjoy!

name: Sparkling Grape Juice
directions: Combine ingredients.
Serve chilled or over ice.
You can adjust the ratio to suit your tastes (prefer more sweet or bubbly) or try other fruit juices for variety in flavor.

name: Pregnant Bananaberry
directions: Mix strawberries, yogurt, milk, bananas and ice cubes in blender at high speed until mixture is smooth and ice is crushed.
Enjoy!

name: Mom's Apple Pie
directions: Mix cinnamon and nutmeg. Set aside.
Blend apple juice, ice cream, orange juice and half of cinnamon-nutmeg mixture at low speed for 1 minute or until ice cream is softened.
Pour into brandy snifters. Sprinkle with cinnamon-nutmeg mixture. Add cinnamon stick.

name: Jogger's Nog Variation
directions: Mix pineapple juice, yogurt, honey and ice cubes in blender at high speed until well blended.
Serve in chilled glasses.

name: The Golden Triangle
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle the lime, lemongrass and sugar. Add in the fruit puree and vodka (or lemonade). Add ice to the cocktail shaker and shake to chill. Strain the liquid into 2 glasses, top with ginger beer and serve.

name: Roe Petal Lemonade
directions: pour boiling water over the rose petals.
let it steep for 10 minuites.
strain the liquide in to a pitcher and throw away the rest.
stir in the sugar & lemon juice & continue stirring until the sugar is dissolved.
put a few fresh petals in the pitcher & fill with ice.
finally pour in the sparkling water.

name: Milkshake Smoothie from Heaven
directions: put all ingredients into a blender. Blend on high untill creamy.

name: Apple Pie in a Glass
directions: Shake all ingredients in a container with a tight fitting lid, or stir in a glass until well blended.

name: Watermelon Beer
directions: Set a fine-mesh strainer over a bowl; set aside.

Place the watermelon in a blender and blend until liquified, about 1 minute. Pour through the strainer into the bowl and scrape a rubber spatula against the inside surface of the strainer to push the juice through until only pulp remains. Discard the pulp and set the strainer back over the bowl. (You should have about 3 cups of juice).
Add the sugar to the juice and stir until dissolved, about 2 minutes. Refrigerate until chilled, about 1 1/2 hours or until ready to use.
When ready to serve, add the maraschino liqueur and beer and stir gently to combine.

similar.name: Watermelon Flavored Syrup for Soft Drinks

name: Orange-Berry Smoothie
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender, and blend until smooth, adding flaxseed if desired.
Pour into 2 glasses and enjoy.

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Pomegranate Paradise Smoothie

name: Carrot-Mango Smoothie
directions: Puree ingredients in a blender until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses and serve.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Pomegranate Paradise Smoothie

name: Energy Smoothie
directions: Blend all ingredients together until smooth and creamy.
Enjoy!

name: Strawberry Soy Smoothie
directions: Place all ingredients in the blender.
Blend until smooth.
Pour into 2 glasses and enjoy!

name: The Strawberry Smoothie
directions: Put all ingredients in mixer.
Blend!
Pour in cup and enjoy :).

similar.name: Jamba Juice at Home Strawberry Shortcake Smoothie

name: Mock Mead
directions: mix the water & honey in a pitcher.
wash the orange,slice it thinly & drop the slices into the pitcher.
sprinkle with nutmeg & chill.
serve in metal or crockery mugs,if you have them.

name: All Inclusive Easter Sangria
directions: Boil the water and pour over the teabags in a large jug. Let steep 15 minutes, then remove the teabags (press out the liquid).
Stir in the sugar (or stevia) and juices.
Allow to cool to room temperature, then stir in the oranges, lemons and limes.
Chill completely.
Just before serving, stir in the frozen berries and soda. Serve over ice.

name: Watermelon-Basil Margarita
directions: Combine the tequila, schnapps, watermelon chunk, lime juice, simple syrup, and 1 basil leaf in a blender with 1 cup of ice.
Blend until smooth; pour into a chilled cocktail glass or Margarita glass.
Garnish with a thin watermelon wedge and remaining basil leaf.

name: Hot Strawberry Cider
directions: Combine apple cider or juice, frozen strawberries, stick cinnamon, and whole cloves in a large saucepan.
Bring to boiling and reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
Strain through a sieve lined with 100%-cotton cheesecloth.
To serve, pour beverage into eight heatproof glasses.
Garnish each serving with a cinnamon stick and a fresh strawberry or apple slice, if desired. Makes 8 (8 oz) servings.

name: Spa Water (Citrus Cucumber)
directions: Place all the sliced fruits and the cucumber in a large glass pitcher; Add water.
Refrigerate for two hours to allow flavors to infuse.
Serve in glasses over ice.
Best if served the day it is made.

similar.name: Spa Cuisine - Zesty Lemon Detox Tea

name: Spiced Lemon Liqueur
directions: Combine all ingredients in an airtight jar. You can shake the jar till the sugar melts, or let it sit and melt slowly.
Let mixture sit for 3 months, squeeze liquid from lemons, strain and let age another month.
Served over ice, this is sublime.

name: Drink Your Breakfast
directions: Add all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Serve cold.

name: Ginger Peach Julep
directions: Combine the peach slices, bourbon, ginger syrup and mint leaves in a mixing glass. Muddle gently, crushing the peaches and bruising (but not tearing) the mint leaves. Let the mixture sit for 2 or 3 minutes.

Pack a highball glass, julep cup or Mason jar with crushed ice and insert a straw. Slowly pour the contents of the mixing glass through a strainer into the ice-packed glass. Garnish with a mint sprig.

name: Best Strawberry Daiquiri
directions: 1. Put everything in blender and mix on high till everything comes together.
2. Add more ice or rum if necessary and remix.

similar.name: Spiced Strawberry Syrup ( and Shrub Recipe)

name: Homemade Vitamin Water
directions: Stir all ingredients in a pitcher. Place in fridge overnight and serve.

name: Pineapple Banana Flax Smoothie
directions: Place ingredients into an immersion blender or regular blender glass.
Blend.
Drink.

similar.name: Pineapple, Apple, Banana and Orange Juice

name: Gingery Peach Cooler
directions: In a pitcher, combine the ginger ale, nectar, peaches, and ginger.
Serve over ice.

name: Jalapeno-Lime Spritzer
directions: In a pitcher, combine the soda, lime juice, nectar, lime, and jalapeno.
Serve over ice.

similar.name: Lime, Plum, Grape, Scallion, Cilantro Juice

name: Banana Frappe
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a parfait or other tall glass and stir.
Garnish with long slice of banana or toasted coconut shreds.

name: Baltimore Zoo
directions: Fill a pitcher with ice, and pour in the tequila, gin, rum, vodka, triple sec, orange juice, and grenadine. Stir to mix, then pour in beer to serve.

Cook's Note: Don't use 3.2% alcohol beer - real beer is best - Budweiser® or similar. I usually make a pitcher at a time in the summer. Use 4 to 5 ounces of each liquor, 16 ounces beer then add in orange juice until pitcher is 3/4 full then pour in grenadine until a dark reddish pink color. Top off remaining pitcher with orange juice.

name: Movies 'till Dawn
directions: Fill a highball glass with ice, and pour in the pineapple juice, rum, vanilla schnapps, and triple sec. Stir to mix, and garnish with lime and maraschino cherries to serve.

name: Southern Sun Cocktail
directions: Mix the juice with sugar in a large pitcher, chill. Right before serving, mix the soda and southern comfort. Fill large glasses with ice and fill with the mixture. Garnish with fruit.

similar.name: Fresh Lime and White Grape Iced Green Tea

name: Hot Peachy Keen Cups Cocktail
directions: Heat the peach juice, brown sugar and four cinnamon sticks in a very large pot until boiling. Reduce the heat and simmer for 3 minuters.
Remove the cinnamon sticks and add the peach schnapps. Serve in individual glasses with additional cinnamon sticks and peach slices.

similar.name: Peach Pie Moonshine a La Mode

name: Bunko Punch
directions: Mix together the tea, water, vodka, orange juice concentrate, and pink lemonade concentrate in a large freezer-proof bowl, such as glass or stainless steel, and freeze overnight or several days ahead. With a fork, scrape the frozen mixture into a slush; pour the grapefruit soda into the slushy mixture, and stir. Keep cold in an ice chest.

name: Peach Spritzer(Non Alcoholic)
directions: Mix together the peach nectar and lemonade in a large glass pitcher.
Top with the sparkling juice and raspberries.
Pour the spritzer into tall ice filled glasses, and garnish each with a slice of peach.
Enjoy!

name: Grandmother's Peach Fuzz
directions: Place the rum, limeade concentrate, and peaches into the container of a blender. Blend until smooth. Add the ice, and blend until finely ground, sweeten with sugar, if desired. Pour into margarita glasses, and enjoy!

name: Purple Power Juice
directions: Wash produce.
Juice.
Pour over ice.

name: Carrot Apple Ginger Juice
directions: Juice.
Pour over ice.

name: Pineapple, Ginger, Celery and Flax Juice (For the Juicer)
directions: Wash the pineapple and celery. Process with the ginger through the juicer.
Stir oil into the juice and mix well.
Pour into a chilled glass and enjoy immediately!

similar.name: Lime, Plum, Grape, Scallion, Cilantro Juice

name: Grenadine Liqueur or Pomegranate Liqueur #1
directions: Heat pomegranate juice over low heat and add sugar. Stir to dissolve and remove from heat.
As it cools, add the vodka or Everclear grain alcohol, orange flower water, and vanilla. Bottle and store.

name: Kalinger Ka Sharbat(Indian Watermelon Refresher)
directions: Place all ingredients except mint in a blender and blend thoroughly.Taste-you may want to add more honey or lemon.
Divide between 4 glasses ,garnish with mint,and serve immediately.

name: Refreshing Lemon Barley Water
directions: Place the barley in a sieve and rinse under cold water until water runs clear.
Place barley in a saucepan with lemon peel and 6 cups of water.
Bring to the boil over medium heat. Once boiling, turn down and simmer for 15-30 minutes then strain mixture into a heatproof bowl. Discard the barley.
Add honey to bowl and stir to dissolve. Stir in lemon juice and then let mixture cool to room temperature.
Pour into bottles and refrigerate until chilled.

name: Peach Watermelon  Smoothie
directions: blend.

name: Guava- Peach Sweet Iced Tea
directions: boil the three cups of water with both tea bags.
steep for ten minutes.
add sugar and guava nectar.
mix and add rest of water.
add peach slices and chill.

similar.name: Garden State Iced Tea "the Fruit Bomb"

name: Sparkling Citrus Cider
directions: Strange orange and tangerine juices through a cheesecloth lined colander into a large bowl.
Combine juices and cider into a large pitcher.
Pour 3/4 cup of the beverage into each of 8 glasses.
Slowly pour 1 1/2 tsp grenandine down inside of each glass (DO NOT stir before serving).

name: Juice Cocktail (Non-Alcoholic Beverage)
directions: Shake with a glassful of broken ice and pour unstrained into a wine goblet or martini glass. Garnish with fruit, if desired, and serve.

name: Passion Fruit Caipirinha
directions: Add lime wedges and sugar to an 8-ounce short glass and muddle by pounding and pressing with a wooden spoon until sugar is dissolved. Fill glass with ice and add passion-fruit juice and cachaca, then stir well.

name: Nimbu Pani (Lemonade)
directions: Prepare sugar syrup first by simmering a cup of water to which 2/3 cup sugar or brown sugar is added. Allow sugar to dissolve completely and cool.
Extract juice from 9-10 limes/lemons or approx 1 cup of lime/lemon juice. Strain and discard the seeds. Keep aside.

Take a pitcher and add 10 cups of cold water, add the extracted lime/lemon juice and cooled sugar syrup and combine. Add 1 tsp of salt and combine. If you find it to be less sweet, add more sugar syrup and if it needs to be more tart, add more lime/lemon juice. Serve with ice in tall glasses.

name: Kharbhooja Sharbat, Melon Beverage
directions: If using small melons, slice off the top of each as a lid, if using large melons, cut them into half.
Cut the edges into zigzag pattern.
Cut a thin slice off the bottom so that the melon stands upright without tipping (take care not to cut through the shell).
Scoop out the seeds and discard.
Scoop out the flesh and process in a blender, along with the remaining ingredients, until smooth.
Chill well and serve in the shells, if desired, with reversed lids and a straw.

name: Andaluz
directions: Pour the sherry over a few ice cubes.
Fill the glass with orange juice.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Paradise Transport Cocktail
directions: In a large cocktail shaker mix agave nectar, coconut milk, light rum, gold rum, lime juice, pineapple juice and coconut water; fill with ice and shake vigorously 20 times.
Do not stain; pour into 2 ice filled glasses.
Garnish with lime slice and maraschino cherry.

name: Lemon Beer - Clara or Shandy
directions: Pour half the beer into each glass. Slowly pour the lemonade into the 2 chilled tall glasses or beer mugs.

name: Pina-Lime Splash   a Tropical Mixed Drink Recipe by J T Deaton
directions: 1. Mix.
2. 1/2 inch or 13mm Slice of Frozen Pineapple Juice Concentrate ( 12oz size ).
3. 1/2 inch or 13mm Slice of Frozen Limeade Juice Concentrate ( 12oz size ).
4. 1-2 Shots or Jigger ( Shot = 1fl oz or 30ml ), ( Jigger = 1.5 fl oz or 44ml )  60-95 proof Rum.
5. 1fl.oz = ( One Fluid Ounce ) Bartenders Sugar Syrup as needed.
6. 1 Shot or Splash of Soda water.
7. 1-2 Cubes Ice or shots of crushed Ice.
8. Serve in cocktail/martini glass or tumbler, garnish with a maraschino cherry and a citrus or pineapple wedge .
9. Pina-Lime Splash Variations:
10. Pina-Lime Splash 7   ( use lemon-lime beverage instead of soda water ).
11. Pina-Lime Alaska     ( Blend 3 or more Ice cubes plus all ingredient's - minus soda or 7up ).
12. Pina-Lime Splash Meltdown  ( Use 151 proof Rum ).
13. Pina-Lime Border Blast   Add (1 Shot = 1fl oz or 30ml ) Tequila.

name: Spicy Sangria
directions: Combine all the ingredients, except for the club soda, in a large serving pitcher, mixing well.
Refrigerate overnight.
Just before serving, mix in the club soda.   Serve over ice.

similar.name: Blood Plum and Rose Water Martini
White Tropical Fruit Sangria from Martinique Bistro

name: Agua De Valencia
directions: To a pitcher add orange juice, gin, vodka and cava or champagne.  Add sugar, a pinch at a time.  Stir and taste until desired sweetness is acheived. Refrigerate until chilled.
Fill a glass with 2 or 3 ice cubes and fill.  Garnish with lemon or lime wedges.

name: Angoor Sharbat
directions: Peel a 1/2" by 3" piece of zest from the orange.  Save the orange for another use.
Tie the zest, cardamom seeds and cloves in a small piece of cheese cloth.
Place the grape juice and honey in a large stainless steel pan and bring it to near the boiling point over moderate heat.
Remove the pan from the heat, add the spice bag and cinnamon stick, cover, and set aside until the juice has cooled to tepid.
Remove the spice bag and cinnamon stick and chill.
Add the water before serving.

name: Basque Lemonade
directions: Soak the lemon peel in the water for 24 hours.
Add the sugar and both types of wine to the water.
Add in the sliced lemons and chill before serving.

name: Raspberry Kir
directions: Mash raspberries, then strain through a sieve/mesh to remove the seeds.
Mix raspberries and Grand Marnier and chill until ready to serve.
Place 1 1/2 teaspoon of raspberry mixture in the bottom of glass.
Slowly fill with champagne and serve.

name: Tropical Storm
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a pitcher. Cover and chill overnight. DIvide among ice-filled glasses. Garnish with orange wedges and maraschino cherries.

name: Sparkling White Peach Bellini Freezes
directions: Place a nine diameter metal cake pan in the freezer.
Bring a large saucepan of water to boil on high heat.
add the peaches to boiling water and cook just til their skins loosen, about 30 seconds.
transer peaches to some ice water and wait until cool.
peel, pit and coarsely chop the peaches.
In a food processor, combine peaches, sugar, and lemon juice until pureed and pour into cake pan.
freeze about two hours.
stir and freeze one hour more.
scoop equal amount slush into 6 champgane flutes.
top with raspberry liquor and prosecco.
garnish with fresh raspberries or peach wedges.

name: Chartreuse Smash
directions: Using a muddler or handle of a wooden spoon, mash sage leaf, 1/2 lime, and honey simple syrup in a 16 oz mixing glass or cocktail shaker 5-6 times to release juices and oils (don't mash to bits).
Stir in liqueur and gin. Transfer to an Old Fashioned glass. Fill halfway with crushed ice, stir, then mound more crushed ice on top.

similar.name: Fresh Lime and White Grape Iced Green Tea

name: Bramble Smash
directions: Using a muddler or handle of a wooden spoon, mush berries, lemon wedges, lime wedges, and simple syrup in a 16 oz mixing glass or a cocktail shaker 5-6 times just to release juices and oils. Add vodka. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass. Fill halfway with crushed ice, stir, then mound more crushed ice on top. Garnish with more berries.

name: Xochipilli's Mezcal Smash
directions: With a muddler or the handle of a wooden spoon, mash pineapple and cinnamon simple syrup in a 16 oz mixing glass or cocktail shaker 4-5 times just to release juices and oils. Add mezcal. Strain into an Old Fashioned glass and fill halfway with crushed ice. Stir, then mound more crushed ice on top.

name: Acadia's Vegan Cremesicle
directions: Mix orange juice and almond milk together and pour over ice.

name: Rhubarb Raspberry Concentrate, for Canning
directions: In a large stainless steel saucepan, combine rhubarb, raspberries and water. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat, stirring constantly. Reduce heat, cover and boil gently until rhubarb is soft, about 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
Transfer to a dampened jelly bag or a strainer lined with several layers of cheesecloth set over a deep bowl. Let drip, undisturbed, for at least 2 hours.
Meanwhile, prepare canner, jars and lids.
In a clean large stainless steel saucepan, combine rhubarb juice and sugar, Heat to 190F (88C) over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar, Do not boil. Remove from heat and skim off foam.
Ladle hot concentrate into hot jars, leaving 1/4 inch head-space. Wipe rim. Center lid on jar. Screw band down until resistance is met, then increase to fingertip-tight.

Place jars in canner, ensuring they are completely covered with water, but at least 1 inch. Bring to a boil and process for 10 minutes (adjusting for above sea level). remove canner lid. Wait 5 minutes, then remove jars, cool and store.
Notes: To reconstitute, mix one part concentrate with one part water, tonic water or ginger ale; adjust concentrate to taste.

name: Granizado De Limon
directions: Zest and juice the lemons.
Add lemon zest to sugar and 250 ml water cook 5 minutes.
Strain add juice of lemons and rest of water; put in freezer for 1 hour.
Stir; add to glass with ice.

name: Lemonade Lychee and Coconut Cocktails
directions: In a saucepan, bring to boil 1 cup water and sugar stirring until sugar is dissolved.  Pour in a pitcher.  Add lemon juice, rum, lytchi and their syrup.  Put in fridge around 4 hours or all night.
Serve with ice.

name: Kiwi-Strawberry Bellini (Alcoholic and Non-Alcoholic)
directions: Remove skin from kiwifruits, cut into quarters. In a food processor or blender, puree until smooth.
Remove stems from strawberries, cut in halves. In a food processor or blender, puree until smooth.
Spoon kiwi puree and strawberry puree onto the bottom of champagne glasses, about 1 to 2 heaping tablespoons each. Pour Prosecco over fruit puree and enjoy.
Note: You can substitute Prosecco with sparkling white grape juice for a non-alcohol version.
You can also substitute kiwi and strawberry with your favorite kind of fruit for this cocktail as well.

name: Mango Lassi
directions: Place all the ingredients in a blender and and process until smooth.
Enjoy!

name: Raspberry-Lemon Prosecco Cocktail
directions: Combine sugar and juice in a small saucepan; bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer 1 minute, stirring until sugar dissolves. Remove from heat. Stir in the zest. Cover and refrigerate overnight. Strain mixture through a fine sieve into a bowl; discard solids.
Combine lemon syrup and prosecco in a pitcher. Pour about 1/2 cup prosecco mixture into each of 12 Champagne flutes; garnish each serving with 3 raspberries. Serve immediately.

name: Rhubarb Shrub
directions: Mix all ingredients in a clean glass jar.
Allow to sit at room temperature for 2 days.
Move the the fridge and allow to age for an additional 7-14 days until the shrub achieves the taste you want.
Strain out and discard the fruit. Keep the shrub in the fridge and enjoy diluted with water, club soda, or in a mixed drink.

name: Watermelon White Pepper Shrub
directions: Puree flesh of the watermelon in a blender.
Pour the flesh into a large bowl, then add sugar and white pepper.
Cover and place in your refrigerator for 2 days. (You’ll begin to notice the liquid separating from the fruit.).
Strain out solids; add champagne vinegar.

Store, covered, in large mason jars or bottles leaving at least half an inch of head room  for 1-2 weeks.  (The longer the shrub ages, the more mellowed out the flavors should become. Just keep it in your refrigerator).

name: Elderberry Shrub
directions: Wash and dry the elderberries, place them in a pint-size jar or non-reactive bowl, and lightly crush using a fork or potato masher.
Add vinegar and stir to combine.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 24 hours, occasionally shaking the jar or stirring the contents of the bowl.
Give the mixture a good shake or stir and then strain using a fine-mesh strainer and/or cheesecloth.
Discard the solids.
Measure the liquid.
For every cup of liquid, use 1 cup of sugar.
Combine liquid and sugar in a saucepan.
Bring to a boil over medium-low heat, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
Boil for 5 minutes and remove from heat.
Let cool; bottle, and refrigerate for up to 2 weeks (the longer it steeps, the more mellow the flavor).
To serve, mix with sparking water. Start with 1 part shrub to 6 parts sparkling water and adjust to taste. The syrup may also be mixed with plain water or used in cocktails.

name: Mango Spritz Cocktail
directions: Place mangoes and Campari/Aperol in the jar of a blender and puree.
Place 1/4 cup mango puree in each of 4 glasses.
Fill with ice; add 1/2 cup white wine and 1/2 cup prosecco to each glass.
Garnish each glass with a slice of orange.
Spear each olive with a toothpick and add to each glass. Serve immediately.

similar.name: White Tropical Fruit Sangria from Martinique Bistro

name: Lively Lemon Gin Tonic
directions: In a cocktail shaker, muddle the  leaves.
Add ice and the gin, lime juice and shake well.
Strain into an ice-filled balloon glass it will enhance all the aromas in the drink.
Wipe the rim with a slice of lemon, stir in the tonic, drizzle blueberry syrup for color and sweetness and garnish with the verbena leaf and lemon slice.

similar.name: Gin and Tonic With Cucumbers and Lemongrass

name: Rosemary Limeade for 2
directions: *Note: I lightly bruised the rosemary in a pestle and mortar.
Combine 1 cup water and sugar in sauce pan.
Bring to boil, stirring to dissolve the sugar.
Boil gently, undisturbed and uncovered for 10 minutes.
Remove pan from heat, stir in the rosemary stem, cover pan and let steep for 1 hour.
Remove the rosemary then add the lime juice and remaining 2 cups of water.
Stir, add ice cubes and garnish with lime slices and a few rosemary needles.

similar.name: Fresh Lime and White Grape Iced Green Tea

name: Blue Law Fizz
directions: In a large bowl or pitcher, gently press the blueberries until they split.  Add lambic beer, prosecco, bitters, and seltzer.  Add honey syrup and lemon juice slowly, adjusting the amount to your desired sweetness or tartness.  Add peaches and lemons.  Serve in small ice-filled cups, making sure that each serving is allotted some of the fruit.

name: Silver Basil Collins
directions: Add all ingredients in a large pitcher and stir gently.  Serve in collins glasses filled with ice.  If desired, garnish each glass with a chunk of honeycomb skewered on a toothpick.

name: Bond Berry Jazztini
directions: Cut berries, cover in sugar and let macerate to release the berry juices. (maybe an hour or so.).
Add vodka, berries and 3-4 ice cubes to a shaker cup, and shake for all it's worth.
Strain into chilled martini glass.

name: Plum Limeade
directions: Blend lime wedges (including peel) in a blender on high speed 10 seconds.
Add plums, ice, water, and sugar and blend until plums are puréed, about 15 seconds.
Pour through a very fine sieve into a pitcher, pressing on solids.
Stir limeade and serve immediately over ice.

name: Jal Jeera (Indian Tamarind,Mint,and Cumin Refresher)
directions: Bring water to a boil.Meanwhile break tamarind into large pieces and place in a bowl.Remove water from heat and pour over the tamarind.set aside to soak for 30 minutes.Strain through a fine mesh strainer,pressing on the pulp with the back of a spoon extracting as much as possible and discarding the seeds and remaining pods and reserving the tamarind water.
Toast cumin seeds over medium heat until they pop.Remove immediately.
Place all ingredients in a blender.Blend on high until well combined.You may strain if desired.serve chilled or over ice.

name: Agua De Pina Y Hierbabuena(Pineapple Mint Agua Fresca)
directions: Peel and chop the pineapple coarsely.Place pineapple,mint and water in a bleder.Blend thoroughly.add honey to taste.
Serve unstrained,chilled or over ice cubes.

name: Pear Cocktail
directions: In a blender, combine pears, pear syrup, vodka, lemon juice, cinnamon and salt; process until smooth.
Pour into cocktail glasses. Garnish each glass with a rosemary sprig.
Note: Drain the canned pears, cut them into chunks, then arrange them on a parchment-lined baking sheet. Freeze, then transfer to a plastic bag until needed.

name: Fizzy Apple Juice
directions: Put apple juice in a cup, the top up with carbonated water.
NB: If you like it fizzy you may want more carbonated water, likewise if you like it less fizzy you should put less carbonated water inches.

name: Homemade Grenadine
directions: Bring the pomegranate juice and sugar to a boil in a saucepan.
Reduce the heat and cover, allowing it to simmer for 10-15 minutes until thickened; stirring occasionally.
Allow the mixture to cool.  Add a dash or two of orange flower water (don't overdo it) and/or vodka then pour into a small decanter or bottle with a tight-sealing lid.
Seal the bottle and give it a few good shakes.  Store refrigerated.

name: Christmas Fig Jam With Cherries
directions: Bring a boiling-water canner, half full with water, to simmer. Enough water to cover the jars by 1-2 inches. Wash jars and screw bands in hot soapy water; rinse with warm water. Or dishwasher and keep hot. Pour boiling water over flat lids in saucepan off the heat. Let stand in hot water until ready to use. Drain well before filling.

Pulse figs, cherries and orange keeping the fruit chunky. Pour fruit into 6- or 8-qt. sauce pot. Add lemon juice,  sugars; stir. Add coconut oil or butter to reduce foaming. Bring mixture to full rolling boil (a boil that doesn't stop bubbling when stirred) on high heat, stirring constantly. Add vanilla.  Stir in pectin. Return to full rolling boil and boil exactly 1 min., stirring constantly. Remove from heat. Skim off any foam with metal spoon.

Ladle immediately into prepared jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of tops. Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids. Screw bands tightly. Place jars on elevated rack in canner. Lower rack into canner. (Water must cover jars by 1 to 2 inches. Add boiling water, if necessary.) Cover; bring water to gentle boil. Process 10 minute Remove jars and place upright on towel to cool completely. After jars cool, check seals by pressing middle of lid with finger. (If lid springs back, lid is not sealed and refrigeration is necessary.).
Sealed jars can be store up to one year in a cool dark pantry.
Unsealed store in refrigerator up to 1 month.
Altitude times:

name: Border Grill's Sweet-And-Sour Mix
directions: Combine ingredients in a glass container. Mix can be covered and refrigerated for 1 to 2 days.

similar.name: Fresh Lime and White Grape Iced Green Tea

name: Vine Wine (Martini)
directions: Muddle or smash 6 red grapes in a mixing glass. Add the wine, simple syrup and vodka. Shake with ice; strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish by draping the remaining grapes over the side of the glass.

name: Simple Mulled Cider by the Mug (For One)
directions: Fill a large mug @ 2/3 full with apple cider and top up with water.
Sprinkle a little cinnamon and nutmeg on top. Nuke in microwave until hot -- about 2 minutes 20 seconds.
Remove from microwave and add a few drops of lemon juice (optional). Enjoy!

name: Chocolate Covered Cherry Martini (Choco-Cherry-Tini)
directions: Fill shaker with ice.
Add everything but cherries; shake vigorously.
Strain into 2 martini glasses. Garnish with cherries. Enjoy!

name: Caravella Dreamsicle
directions: Combine  in a shaker.
Shake well and serve on the rocks.
Garnish with orange.

name: Caravella Orange Venezia
directions: Combine Orangecello and vodka in rocks glass, fill with tonic water.
Stir and garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Caravella Orange Sunrise
directions: Combine in a shaker.
Shake well and pour over rocks in a tall glass.
Add a splash of grenadine and garnish with a slice of orange.

name: Martini Sicilian Style
directions: Combine in a shaker.
Shake well and strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with orange peel.

name: Orangecello Cosmopolitan
directions: Combine into a shaker.
Shake well and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with orange peel.

name: Sparkling Meyer Lemon Cocktail
